items.scenario: You are the coordinator for a campus film society and you booked a screening room at the Riverside Cultural Center for next Saturday. The center sent confirmation but did not include details about projector compatibility or the load-in time for your guest speaker.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Pritchard. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the screening event you have scheduled
Ask about projector format and load-in arrangements
Explain why the guest speaker needs early access
items.subject: Projector and load-in details for Saturday screening

items.scenario: You are a junior taking an environmental policy seminar and you have been working on a term paper comparing flood-management programs in two coastal cities. After your most recent meeting, you realized you need clarification on whether oral interviews can substitute for some printed sources.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Whitfield. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the current direction of your research paper
Ask whether oral interviews can replace some printed sources
Explain how this change would strengthen your argument
items.subject: Source flexibility for the flood-management paper

items.scenario: Your friend Marcus invited you to join a four-day cycling trip along the Blue Ridge Parkway over the long weekend. You want to join, but a family commitment requires you to drive back early on Sunday, ahead of the rest of the group.
items.direction: Write an email to Marcus. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank Marcus for including you in the trip plan
Describe the constraint on your Sunday schedule
Suggest a logistics arrangement that lets you leave early
items.subject: Joining the Blue Ridge ride with an early Sunday return

items.scenario: You ordered a refurbished espresso machine from an online appliance store three weeks ago. After about two weeks of normal use, the pump began making a loud rattling noise, and the steam wand stopped producing pressure on the very next morning.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Stenberg. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problems with the espresso machine
Ask which return or repair option is available now
Explain why a quick resolution matters for you
items.subject: Defective espresso machine on order ES-71204
